## Type of change

- [ ] Editorial fix (typo, link, wording) — no RFC needed
- [ ] Spec change implementing an accepted RFC (link below)
- [ ] SDK change (Apache-2.0 tree)
- [ ] CI / tooling
- [ ] Documentation only

## Related RFC

<!-- For spec changes: link to the RFC PR or merged RFC file. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] CI is green locally (`spectral lint spec/openapi.yaml` and
      `markdownlint "**/*.md"`)
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`)
- [ ] No internal PRD docx committed (the spec lives in `spec/` and
      `docs/`, not in Word documents)
